name: base_replan_path
description: Execute a simple segmented base path to a target or explicit waypoint list.

parameters.waypoints: Optional list of [base_x, base_y, base_yaw] waypoints.
parameters.target_x/target_y: Target world xy used to generate a two-segment path.
parameters.object_body/object_geom: Optional target object used instead of explicit target xy.
parameters.standoff_distance: Distance to stop before the target.
parameters.lateral_clearance: Side offset used for the generated midpoint.
